Iced spanish latte is a sweet and refreshing iced coffee made with espresso, chilled milk, and sweetened condensed milk. it's served over ice, creating a smooth and creamy texture with a wonderful balance of intense coffee flavor and sweetness.
Iced matcha latte is a creamy blend of premium matcha green tea and cold milk, served over ice for a refreshing, smooth, and invigorating drink with a soothing touch.
Iced hibiscus tea is a refreshing and citrusy herbal tea made from hibiscus flowers. it is served cold over ice for a refreshing and soothing drink. a perfect choice on a warm day.
French toast is a classic breakfast delight, made with golden brown bread dipped in eggs and drizzled with caramel syrup and powdered sugar. perfect for a sweet and savory treat

Golden toasted bread layered with rich, creamy cheesecake filling, lightly sweetened and perfectly balanced. finished to a soft-crisp texture, this groovy favorite delivers comfort, indulgence, and a satisfying cheesecake bite in every slice.

Iced latte is a refreshing and creamy coffee made with rich espresso, cold milk, and ice. it offers a balanced blend of intense flavor and a velvety texture, making it the perfect choice for a relaxed iced coffee experience.
Iced flat white is a cold brew coffee made with rich espresso and smooth milk, offering the perfect balance of intense flavor and creamy texture. it's ideal for a foam-free cold brew.
